visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a title card displaying the channel logo. It then transitions to a 2D animated scene featuring a black-haired boy, Xiao Yao, speaking with an earnest expression. The setting is a simplified nighttime street with dark blue and grey tones. (2) The scene cuts to a bald boy, Ah Chu, who looks nervous with sweat drops on his head. He avoids eye contact. The camera stays in a close-up or medium shot to focus on their facial expressions. (3) As they converse, the animation uses exaggerated facial features like wide eyes and blushing to show emotion. There is a brief cutaway to a stylized, simpler illustration of the two characters sitting together and eating. (4) Back to the main scene, Ah Chu reacts with shock and embarrassment, his face turning red. Xiao Yao leans in closer with a confident, smiling face. The background remains consistent throughout the interaction. (5) The video ends with a closing graphic that contains the channel logo and a call to action to watch the full version elsewhere.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. (2) [Subtitle]: 其實我找你是有事想要討論. (3) [Subtitle]: 什麼事? (4) [Subtitle]: 不知道為什麼. (5) [Subtitle]: 總覺得你跟提拉很好. (6) [Subtitle]: 你們聊天我都插不上話題. (7) [Subtitle]: 而且你跟他在一起. (8) [Subtitle]: 感覺好像. (9) [Subtitle]: 也比較開心... (10) [Subtitle]: 你吃醋喔? (11) [Subtitle]: 我沒有! (12) [Subtitle]: 就是覺得好像哪裡怪怪的. (13) [Subtitle]: 哦. (14) [Subtitle]: 這就是吃醋啊. (15) [Subtitle]: 好啦, 我就是吃醋啦! (16) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. (17) [Subtitle]: 什麼鬼啦. (18) [Subtitle]: 你想太多了啦. (19) [Subtitle]: 我跟提拉再怎麼聊. (20) [Subtitle]: 也只是聊泰國的東西啊. (21) [Subtitle]: 不像跟你在一起. (22) [Subtitle]: 我們什麼都可以聊. (23) [Subtitle]: 不過我也很抱歉. (24) [Subtitle]: 我沒有注意到你的心情. (25) [Subtitle]: 至於你說我跟他在一起比較開心. (26) [Subtitle]: 跟他在一起是開心沒錯. (27) [Subtitle]: 但是跟你在一起. (28) [Subtitle]: 我可以更加做自己. (29) [Subtitle]: 可以感到放鬆. (30) [Subtitle]: 不需要去思考別的東西. (31) [Subtitle]: 跟你在一起. (32) [Subtitle]: 就是能感到非常平靜. (33) [Subtitle]: 但如果你很介意. (34) [Subtitle]: 我可以改喔. (35) [Subtitle]: 天啊, 我是白痴嗎. (36) [Subtitle]: 竟然因為提拉吃醋. (37) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. (38) [Subtitle]: 就說你是白痴了吧. (39) [Subtitle]: 一直罵自己的部分. (40) [Subtitle]: 不會啊, 你吃醋的話. (41) [Subtitle]: 代表你真的很喜歡我啊. (42) [Subtitle]: 什麼東西. (43) [Subtitle]: 我也是喔. (44) [Subtitle]: 可惡的情場高手小藥. (45) [Slogan]: 阿啾吃醋, 學長的回答. [Slogan]: 完整影片在 Youtube.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Ah Chu is a bald animated character wearing a black shirt. Xiao Yao has black hair and is wearing a red shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simplified urban street at night with blue and grey color tones, featuring some basic architectural outlines and street lights.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic male dialogue begins immediately with an audible percussive 'pop' sound effect. A light acoustic guitar and piano BGM track plays steadily at a moderate tempo. (2) A second, calmer and lower-pitched male voice enters, responding with steady articulation and a warm tone. (3) A sudden 'ding' sound effect emphasizes a moment of realization in the dialogue. The first voice rises in pitch and speed, conveying embarrassment and high arousal. (4) Transition sound effects like 'whooshes' are heard between rapid dialogue exchanges. The BGM remains light and cheerful, supporting the comedic narrative. (5) The audio track concludes with a signature channel brand jingle, featuring a short melodic phrase and a percussive accent.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Confession -> Misunderstanding -> Emotional Climax -> Humorous Resolution
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a short, relatable, and humorous animated story about jealousy and romantic reassurance within a relationship context.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Text overlays explicitly direct viewers to 'Full video on Youtube'.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a distinctive 2D animation style with high-speed editing and comedic timing common in social media shorts.
